data.title: ‘Alt season has begun’: CryptoQuant CEO
data.description:
This time, the season will be likely driven by stablecoin holders, rather than a rotation out of Bitcoin, he said.

data.title: U.S. Senators Urge SEC To Reevaluate Crypto ETF Staking
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 22, U.S. bipartisan senators have addressed a letter to the acting chairman of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Mark Uyeda, urging a reassessment of the issues surrounding crypto ETF staking. The senators emphasized the significance of staking for blockchain security and investor interests. The letter was spearheaded by Republican Senator Cynthia Lummis and received support from Democratic Senators Kirsten Gillibrand and Ron Wyden.

data.title: Ben Zhou, CEO: Bybit is solvent, will cover all claims despite a growing withdrawal queue
data.description:
Bybit will repay all users, though some of the lost Ethereum (ETH) may be secured via a bridge loan for short-term claims. The exchange has enough reserves to compensate all users in kind, and is working through the withdrawal queue.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ben-zhou-ceo-bybit-is-solvent-will-cover-all-claims-despite-a-growing-withdrawal-queue/

data.title: PEPE Erases Zero Amid Crypto Market Rebound, What's Next for Price?
data.description:
PEPE jumped as much as 7% as crypto market rebounded
source: https://u.today/pepe-erases-zero-amid-crypto-market-rebound-whats-next-for-price

data.title: Bitcoin mining will be profitable for at least 12 more years, says Blockware CEO
data.description:
Mason Jappa predicts Bitcoin mining will stay profitable for at least 12 more years, but post-2036, miners will rely on transaction fees or a $1 million BTC price.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/innovation/bitcoin-mining-will-be-profitable-for-at-least-12-years

data.title: Huge Moment For Crypto As SEC Agrees To Dismiss Enforcement Case Against Coinbase; Is XRP Lawsuit Next?
data.description:
The U.S. SEC has agreed in principle to drop the lawsuit against Coinbase, pending approval from the agency’s commissioners before it’s completely dropped.
source: https://zycrypto.com/huge-moment-for-crypto-as-sec-agrees-to-dismiss-enforcement-case-against-coinbase-is-xrp-lawsuit-next/
